title: clematis psilandra
intro: Clematis psilandra, also known as the 'Manchurian Clematis', is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family Ranunculaceae. Traditionally, Clematis psilandra has been used in herbal medicine, primarily for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating skin conditions due to its antimicrobial properties. Clematis psilandra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
